ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the department belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager in charge of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager is in charge of */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager left the company */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Annual performance rating of the manager */,
  "direct_reports_count" INTEGER /* Number of direct reports the manager has */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_details" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the compensation is for */,
  "base_salary" INTEGER /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "stock_grant_value" INTEGER /* Value of stock grants received by the employee */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus received by the employee */,
  "total_yearly_compensation" INTEGER /* Total yearly compensation of the employee */,
  "compensation_date" TEXT /* Date when the compensation was last updated */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus */,
  "bonus_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the bonus */,
  "stock_grant_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock grant was issued */,
  "stock_grant_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the stock grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the demographic is for */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the employee */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the employee */,
  "race_asian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is of Asian race */,
  "race_white" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is of White race */,
  "race_two_or_more" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is of two or more races */,
  "race_black" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is of Black race */,
  "race_hispanic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is of Hispanic race */,
  "masters_degree" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has a Master's degree */,
  "bachelors_degree" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has a Bachelor's degree */,
  "doctorate_degree" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has a Doctorate degree */,
  "highschool" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has a high school education */,
  "some_college" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee has some college education */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the employee has a disability */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the employee is a veteran */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career progression record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the progression is for */,
  "years_of_experience" REAL /* Total years of experience of the employee */,
  "years_at_company" REAL /* Years the employee has been with the company */,
  "level" TEXT /* Employee level or grade */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "previous_title" TEXT /* Previous job title */,
  "previous_level" TEXT /* Previous level or grade */,
  "performance_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of performance reviews conducted */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Total training hours completed by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Manager, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the user left the company */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
